title: CAPM: Which of the following statements about the Capital Market Line...
summary: Apply the Capital Asset Pricing Model to calculate expected returns or evaluate security pricing.
prompt: Which of the following statements about the Capital Market Line (CML) is true?

options.text: Expected excess return per unit of risk
The Capital Market Line (CML) represents portfolios that optimally combine risk

solution: The Capital Market Line (CML) represents portfolios that optimally combine risk and return for efficient portfolios. It is a graphical representation that demonstrates the expected return of a portfolio as a function of its risk (standard deviation). The CML is derived from the risk-free rate and the market portfolio, indicating the best possible return for a given level of risk.
